title: Choose the Right Animal
description: Select an animal that is healthy, free from defects, and meets the age requirements as per Islamic guidelines.

title: Verify Health Records
description: Always ask for vaccination records and health certificates.

title: Check Age Requirements
description: Ensure the animal meets the required age for Qurbani.

title: Book Early for Best Selection
description: Book your Qurbani animal early to get the best selection.

title: Proper Distribution
description: Divide the meat among family, relatives, and the needy.

title: Timely Sacrifice
description: Perform the sacrifice during the prescribed Eid days.
